name: Dou Shou Qi (Jungle)
author: Traditional (Chinese) / AGP port
description: Dou Shou Qi (鬥獸棋), "Jungle" / "Animal Chess", on a 7x9 board. Each side has eight ranked animals (Elephant 8 down to Rat 1). A piece captures an enemy of equal or lower rank, except the Rat captures the Elephant. All pieces move one square orthogonally; only the Rat may enter the river, and the Lion and Tiger may leap across it (blocked by a Rat in the water). Enemy pieces on your traps become capturable by anything. Win by moving a piece into the enemy den (or leaving the opponent with no move).
